title: Entity Resolve Response
description: Output schema for the entity resolver (Phase 3 Step 2). Emitted by lib/entity-resolver.ts to stdout. Consumed by Step 3 YAML generator to gate automation generation.

query.description: The original query string that was resolved.

matches.description: Candidate matches sorted by confidence descending, capped at limit. Empty array when nothing meets min_confidence.

best.description: The highest-confidence match, or absent if matches is empty.

missing.description: True when matches is empty. Step 3 MUST block YAML generation when missing=true.

needs_review.description: True when best.confidence < min_confidence or when best.match_type is not in [exact, casefold, alias_exact]. Step 3 MUST flag the result for human review before applying.

suggested_aliases.description: Alias patches a human can approve and add to entities.json. Only populated when best.confidence >= 0.85 and the query is not already in the entity aliases or friendly_name.

entity_id.description: Canonical HA entity identifier resolved from the query.

domain.description: HA domain of the resolved entity.

confidence.description: Confidence score 0..1. Includes domain/area hint boosts. Clamped to 1.0.

match_type.description: Which matching stage produced this result. Used by Step 3 to decide gating behaviour.

reason.description: Short human-readable explanation of why this match was selected.

add_alias.description: The alias string to add to entities.json. Must be approved by a human before application.
